log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Astral Elf — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:2+3=5 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:18+-2=16 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:11+-2=9 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 2/3 targets affected.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Astral Elf — Armored Escapist.
→ Javelin: [d20:19+6=25 vs AC 20] HIT! 11 damage. Astral Elf — Armored Escapist HP: 48/59
→ Concentration save: [d20:11+3=14 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
--- Ogre --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 11 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Astral Elf — Armored Escapist --- HP: 48/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Ogre (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Ogre.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:4+-2=2 vs DC 15] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 54/59
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Astral Elf — Armored Escapist.
→ Javelin: [d20:2+6=8 vs AC 20] MISS.
